page_content:
ANTH468 Special Topics in Cultural Anthropology (3 Credits)

Advanced courses in varying specialty areas of cultural anthropology that respond to new theoretical developments, faculty research interests, or specialties of visiting scholars.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

ANTH469 Advanced Special Topics in Cultural Anthropology (3 Credits) Upper level cultural anthropology courses on varying topics derived from new interests of the faculty or the specialties of visiting scholars. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
